prompt: A candid documentary-style indoor family snapshot in a modest early-2000s living room in China, photographed like a real consumer camera photo with soft ambient daylight, slight grain, natural color, and a yellow date stamp in the bottom right reading 2003.02.02. The scene shows exactly 3 people: a little girl in the foreground sitting cross-legged on a patterned carpet and playing with a colorful toy car, one adult kneeling on the floor near the TV stand in a light gray sweater and blue pants, and one adult leaning over electronics equipment in a dark blue long-sleeve shirt near a sofa. Make the image feel unposed, nostalgic, and convincingly photographic, as if captured during an ordinary afternoon at home. On the left side, include 1 bulky CRT television displaying black-and-white static snow, sitting on a dark media stand with stacked electronics and shelves below. In the center background, place a wall calendar showing 2003, and a wooden shelving unit holding framed family photos, books, tapes, and small household items. On the right side, include 1 sofa draped in a light floral lace cover with a blue folder or notebook resting on the arm. Add domestic clutter and lived-in details: exactly 2 potted plants on the floor by the TV, a patterned rug covering most of the floor, and a slightly dim, warm, everyday apartment atmosphere. The child should wear a pink sweater and dark pants, with small tied pigtails, focused downward on the toy. The overall style should be highly realistic, like a genuine archival family photograph rather than an illustration, with believable perspective, soft shadows, and subtle lens imperfections.
